parameters.name: div
parameters.override_behavior: sets the number of input-clock cycles in each repeating burst frame

parameters.name: vdd
parameters.override_behavior: sets the voltage-coded CLK_OUT high level

parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets the CLK and active-low reset decision threshold

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic threshold-crossing event logic and voltage output contribution.
Treat reset as active low and restart the frame deterministically.
Do not add undeclared clocks, ports, or validation-only frame controls.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: While RST_N is below vth, CLK_OUT is low and the burst frame counter is restarted.
After reset release, rising CLK crossings advance a repeating frame of div input-clock cycles beginning at position 0.
At frame positions 0 and 1, CLK_OUT passes the voltage-coded CLK waveform, including its high and low phases.
At frame positions 2 through div minus 1, CLK_OUT remains low regardless of CLK level.
The two-cycle burst followed by the quiet remainder repeats every div rising CLK crossings.
CLK_OUT uses 0 V and vdd as its voltage-coded low and high levels.

title: Burst Clock Source
